rationale: Lord Lyonel does not join the Lords Declarant who try to depose Petyr Baelish as Lord Protector of the Vale
Lyonel marries the sixteen-year-old daughter of a rich Gulltown merchant, a match brokered by Petyr Baelish
When Lord Corbray was wounded during the Battle of the Trident, Lyonel carried his father back
His younger brother is Ser Lyn Corbray
